nasb.text: For the ransom of the 273 of the firstborn of the sons of Israel who are in excess beyond the Levites,

esv.text: And as the redemption price for the 273 of the firstborn of the people of Israel, over and above the number of the male Levites,

cnv.text: 至於那超過利未人總數的二百七十三個，需要贖回的以色列人的長子，

ccb.text: 以色列人所有长子的人数比利未人总数多二百七十三人，这些多出来的人需要被赎回，
